You think I should be at home cooking dinner because I'm a girl, don't you?!$a"/speak Abigail "You're really stuck in the past, Dad... $a"/speak Abigail "I mean, at least you accept that I AM a girl at all... $u"/showFrame Pierre 16/textAboveHead Pierre "...!"/faceDirection Abigail 2/speak Abigail "Let's get out of here, @.$a"/showFrame Pierre 0/move Abigail -1 0 2 true/faceDirection farmer 3/move Abigail 0 2 2/faceDirection farmer 2 true/move Abigail 0 3 2 true/faceDirection Pierre 2 true/pause 1000/pause 500/faceDirection Abigail 0/speak Abigail "Well, are you coming or not?$u"/pause 600/faceDirection farmer 1/pause 1000/move farmer 0 8 2 true/move Abigail 0 4 1 false/move farmer 8 0 2 true/move Abigail 8 0 2 true/textAboveHead Pierre "Come back!"/globalFade/viewport -4000 0/pause 400/playSound grassyStep/pause 500/playSound grassyStep/pause 300/playSound leafrustle/pause 700/playSound leafrustle/pause 700/message "Okay, my dad won't find us here..."/speak Abigail "*sigh*... Can you believe my parents were ever young? They don't understand my perspective at all.$8#$b#I know, I know... they grew up in a different era, with different values. Entries.TransAbby_AbigailOrchi1/Friendship Abiga: continue/-1000 -1000/farmer 63 54 1 Abigail 73 54 2/skippable/mail TransAbby_AbbyOrchi/viewport 73 54 true/move farmer 6 0 1/pause 500/emote Abigail 40/faceDirection Abigail 3/pause 500/speak Abigail "Hi, @."/move farmer 2 0 1/message "Abigail seems lost in thought..."/speak Abigail "There's something I've been thinking about doing.#$b#But I'm really nervous."/emote farmer 8/speak Abigail "It would be a big step for my transition."/pause 100/speak Abigail "I'm thinking of getting an orchiectomy."/quickQuestion #What's an orchiectomy?#That sounds like a great idea!#Are you sure?(break)switchEvent TransAbby_AbigailOrchi1_Option(break)friendship Abigail 30\speak Abigail "That's nice to hear, @.$h#$b#I'm glad I'll have your support if I go through with this.#h"\move Abigail -1 0 3(break)friendship Abigail -10\speak Abigail "I think I'm as sure as I can be.$u#$q TransAbby_AbigailOrchi1_QuestionR1/TransAbby_AbigailOrchi1_QuestionR2 null#Will you support me if I do this, @?#$r TransAbby_AbigailOrchi1_QuestionR1 30 TransAbby_EventBridge1#Of course!#$r TransAbby_AbigailOrchi1_QuestionR2 -20 TransAbby_EventBridge2#Sorry, no..."/faceDirection Abigail 2/emote Abigail 40/pause 100/faceDirection Abigail 3/pause 100/speak Abigail "I think I'll make a decision tonight."/fork TransAbby_AbigailOrchi1_QuestionR1 TransAbby_AbigailOrchi1_AbigailWalk/fade/end
